pi_items.source: Odoo official demo data (hr/data/hr_demo.xml) confirmed in setup_data.py:5-10; setup_task.sh:46 searches for this employee
setup_task.sh:71 creates expense with name='Client Lunch'
setup_task.sh:74 sets total_amount=125.50; also shown in generated receipt image at setup_task.sh:19
setup_task.sh:23 saves generated receipt file to this path
setup_task.sh:23 generates file with this name

privileged_info_summary: The task targets employee Marc Demo (from Odoo's official demo data) and expense record 'Client Lunch' for $125.50. The receipt file 'receipt_lunch.jpg' is synthetically generated using ImageMagick with dimensions 400x600 pixels and contains text showing the restaurant, itemized expense, and total amount. The expense record is created via Odoo's XML-RPC API during task setup. All metadata values in task.json match their corresponding implementations.
